title: dendrobium cuneiforme
intro: Dendrobium cuneiforme, also known as the toothbrush orchid or cuneate dendrobium, is a type of flowering orchid native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dendrobium cuneiforme include its ability to promote digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea or tincture form, with the roots being a key component for medicinal purposes.
